text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Um, maybe we should head back? It's, like, kinda
getting cold...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
On the contrary, it's as hot and stuffy as ever...
and about time you learned to face your fears.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
That you would forget your candy at the bus stop
in the first place is just... preposterous. I wouldn't
bet they were left untouched, but we should
check nonetheless.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Omigosh, you were definitely the wrong person to ask for help!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rustle, rustle...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Did y-you h-hear something just now?!
What if it's a ghost?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It's not. Ghosts don't exist. ...It's coming from
over there.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rustle...
Hiyaaaa! Hoiyaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Take that, you stupid ghost! You won't be
disturbing this plane on my watch!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Time to test whether the Kongo Yaegaki style of
fighting can even best a specter! ...Hm? Do I
sense this thing is of the living?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Are you trying to kill us or something?! I thought
my heart was gonna stop for good!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Apologies. Bamboo was spurred into action by
the ghost, so I followed her lead.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
And I found the troublemakers after all! I knew it
was a good idea to go on patrol!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
What are you two doing out so late? Wait, are
you the Dragger in disguise?!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: The Dragger? That doesn't sound real at all.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
It's legit! There's a rumor going around that after
dark, you'll hear this shuffling sound around here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rustle, rustle...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
The sound is coming from the shore. This time,
perhaps it really is a ghost. Let us go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thud, thud, thud... Rustle!
Marvelooooous!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Gyaaaagh! It's heeeere!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Looks like we've got some new
customers. ♪ I knew adding more bamboo slides
was the answer.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Wowiee! ☆ Our noodle slide evening
extravaganza just got more marvelous! ★

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
L-look at how meticulously they've weaved the
bamboo... It's a work of art.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
So this is the true identity of the Dragger! You
have been shuffling bamboo around night after
night to make this noodle slide contraption.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
This isn't the time to talk! Their actions have
disrupted the peace, and therefore this must be
dismantled!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
But we got permission from the director. ♪
Besides, we have to serve our hungry customers.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
That fifth person in your group is practically
drooling over the noodles. ★ Take a look, right
behind you...

text_block_list.name: Everyone
text_block_list.text: Huh?
